rules.rule_text:
rule BlackShadesServer
{
	meta:
		author = "Brian Wallace @botnet_hunter"
		author_email = "bwall@ballastsecurity.net"
		date = "2014-08-16"
		description = "Identify BlackShadesServer"

	strings:
		$str1 = "bss_server"
		$str2 = "txtChat"
		$str3 = "UDPFlood"

	condition:
		all of them
}
